_comment: Pinned tree-sitter grammar WASM artifacts for the chunker. Parity-critical: the chunk boundaries these grammars produce ARE the per-chunk LLM input, so the versions MUST match the frozen Python reference (vendor/codemaster-py) exactly. See docs/adr/0067-tree-sitter-wasm-chunker-parity-dependency.md.
tree_sitter_core_reference: 0.25.2 (frozen Python `tree-sitter`; grammars compiled at ABI 15). The TS runtime uses `web-tree-sitter` ^0.25 which loads ABI-15 grammar .wasm.
no_runtime_fetch: These .wasm are vendored into the repo and loaded from this directory at startup. They are NEVER fetched at runtime (per the dep adoption conditions).

typescript.note: language_typescript() variant. Routes .ts files. The tsx variant is the sibling 'tsx' entry below.

tsx.note: language_tsx() variant — parses JSX. Routes .tsx files. Ships in the same tree-sitter-typescript tarball as a second .wasm. Parity verified: byte-identical parse to Python language_tsx() on jsx_body.tsx.

reproduce: For each grammar at the pinned version: `npm pack <source_npm>` → `tar xzf <pkg>-<ver>.tgz` → `cp package/<wasm> apps/backend/src/chunking/grammars/` → verify `shasum -a 256` matches the sha256 above. The .wasm ships prebuilt inside the npm tarball; no emscripten build is required.
